items.title: Brazil monitors two patients for possible Ebola infection
items.dek: If confirmed, they would be the first infection cases outside Africa, since the outbreak began in DR Congo.
items.body: If confirmed, they would be the first infection cases outside Africa, since the outbreak began in DR Congo.

items.title: Dead whale towed ashore in Denmark ahead of autopsy
items.dek: "Timmy" was found dead off the coast of Anholt despite multiple attempts to rescue it.
items.body: "Timmy" was found dead off the coast of Anholt despite multiple attempts to rescue it.
